question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?founder ?party
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P161 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P102 ?party .
  ?founder wdt:P39 wd:Q844135 .
}

On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q105710350 wdt:P569 ?brookeBirth .
  wd:Q105710350 wdt:P119 ?brookeResidence .
  wd:Q105710350 rdfs:label "Brooke Raboutou"@en .
  wd:Q105710350 wdt:P27 ?brookeCountry .
  wd:Q105710351 wdt:P569 ?colinBirth .
  wd:Q105710351 wdt:P119 ?colinResidence .
  wd:Q105710351 rdfs:label "Colin Duffy"@en .
  wd:Q105710351 wdt:P27 ?colinCountry .
  FILTER (?brookeCountry = ?colinCountry) .
  FILTER (?brookeCountry = wd:Q30) .
  ?brookeState wdt:P131* ?brookeResidence .
  ?colinState wdt:P131* ?colinResidence .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState) .
}

On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?platform
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q7884499 .
  ?game wdt:P400 ?platform .
  ?platform wdt:P161 wd:Q866 .
  FILTER (LANGMATCHES(LANG(?game), "en"))
}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P279* wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER (?date > "1990-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?
Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?start ?end ?joinYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?statement1 .
  ?statement1 ps:P54 wd:Q142701 .
  ?statement1 pq:P580 ?end .
  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?statement2 .
  ?statement2 ps:P54 wd:Q142701 .
  ?statement2 pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER (?start = ?end)
  BIND(YEAR(?start) AS ?joinYear)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P2561 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?

query.sparql: SELECT (AVG(COUNT(?spouse)) AS ?averageSpouses) WHERE { ?headOfState wdt:P35 ?headOfStateValue . ?headOfState wdt:P26 ?spouse . } GROUP BY ()

question.string: Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190156 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q193370 AS ?item) .
  ?item p:P1082 ?populationStatement .
  ?populationStatement ps:P1082 ?population .
  ?populationStatement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  FILTER (DATATYPE(?population) = xsd:integer) .
}
ORDER BY ?year

question.string: How many international airports are located within the city of Hamburg ?
On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P175 ?artist .
  ?artist wdt:P735 "Lana Del Rey" .
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q4829940 .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?album wdt:P577 ?date1 . ?album2 wdt:P577 ?date2 .
                     FILTER (?date1 < ?date2) .
                     ?album2 wdt:P175 ?artist .
                     ?album2 wdt:P31 wd:Q4829940 .
                     FILTER (?album != ?album2) }
}

  ?bryanEvenson p:P803 ?professorshipStatement .
  ?professorshipStatement ps:P803 ?employedAt .

}

WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountain_range .

}

question.string: Is math related to science ?

SELECT ?math ?science
WHERE {
  ?math wdt:P2578 ?mathDescription .

  FILTER CONTAINS(?mathDescription, "math") .
  FILTER CONTAINS(?scienceDescription, "science") .

}

question.string: What colors does the German national flag have?
What did the suffragettes stand for?
What do you call a female form of an emperor in English?
What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?person wdt:P509 ?event .
  FILTER(YEAR(?personDeath) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?personDeath) <= 1920) .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?personBirth .
  ?person wdt:P570 ?personDeath .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?event ?eventLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

What is the combined total revenue of three largest Big Tech companies ordered by number of employees?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?company ?revenue (COUNT(?employee) AS ?num_employees) WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P1838 "computer science" .
  ?company wdt:P2139 ?revenue .
  ?company wdt:P116 ?industry .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?industry), "technology") .
  ?company wdt:P112 ?employee .
}
GROUP BY ?company ?revenue
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?employee))
LIMIT 3

question.string: What other civilizations existed during the Aztecs ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?civilization ?civilizationLabel
WHERE
{
  ?civilization wdt:P6885 ?historicalRegion .
  ?aztec wdt:P6885 ?aztecHistoricalRegion .
  FILTER (?civilization != ?aztec) .
  FILTER (EXISTS { ?aztec wdt:P172 wd:Q485538 } ) .
  FILTER (EXISTS { ?civilization wdt:P6885 ?historicalRegion .
                   ?aztec wdt:P6885 ?aztecHistoricalRegion .
                   FILTER (?historicalRegion = ?aztecHistoricalRegion) } ) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
